vocab.meaning: đánh dấu một cột mốc quan trọng
vocab.example: My parents gave me a classic timepiece to mark a milestone when I graduated from university with honors.

vocab.meaning: vật kỷ niệm/biểu hiện của sự trân trọng
vocab.example: I received a sleek digital watch from my previous company as a token of appreciation for my five years of service.
The gold watch I got for my 21st birthday has become a cherished memento that I only wear on formal occasions.

vocab.meaning: mang tính kỷ niệm, tưởng niệm
vocab.example: It was a commemorative watch engraved with my name, making it feel incredibly personal and unique.

vocab.meaning: để lại, truyền lại (qua di chúc hoặc thừa kế)
vocab.example: My grandfather decided to bequeath his vintage mechanical watch to me, which is the most meaningful gift I’ve ever received.
It was a very generous gesture from my uncle to give me such a high-end luxury watch for my wedding.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp vượt thời gian (không bao giờ lỗi mốt)
vocab.example: The watch I was gifted has a timeless appeal, so I know I’ll still be wearing it ten or twenty years from now.

vocab.meaning: vô cùng vui mừng, hạnh phúc
vocab.example: I was absolutely overjoyed when I unwrapped the box and saw the elegant silver watch I had been eyeing for months.

vocab.meaning: cất kỹ, để dành ở một nơi an toàn
vocab.example: Since it's so valuable, I keep that gifted watch tucked away in a velvet-lined box rather than wearing it to work.

vocab.meaning: được làm theo yêu cầu riêng
vocab.example: My partner surprised me with a custom-made watch featuring a unique leather strap that matches my style perfectly.
